$comment: Property variables. NO lesson content lives here — only the facts that differ between hotels. Lesson text refers to these with {{token}} and they are substituted at runtime. A value may be a plain string (same in both languages) or an { en, th } pair when the English word and its Thai rendering differ — e.g. the outlet 'Talay' is written 'ทะเล' in Thai. Adding a third property means writing one of these files and nothing else.

name.th: เดอะ แซนด์ส เขาหลัก

vars.outlet.signature.pitch: right on the beach, with live music and a fresh seafood display
